body: [{"ac":1,"text":"rust-toolchain.toml pins Rust 1.85.1 with clippy and rustfmt. 2. Cargo.toml repository metadata uses https://github.com/easel/heimq. 3. Dockerfile builder image aligns with the pinned Rust version or documents an equivalent digest-pinned choice. 4. A justfile or Makefile exposes fmt, clippy, test, ci, docker-build, helm-check, bench-smoke, and parity targets. 5. cargo fmt --all -- --check passes. 6. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings passes. 7. cargo test --workspace --all-targets passes. 8. helm lint charts/heimq and helm template heimq charts/heimq pass.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
